rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CURRIER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 30, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 10. Defendant Scott Co. of California¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Mr. Cantley¿s declaration creates a triable issue whether Mr. Currier was exposed to asbestos-containing insulation disturbed by defendant. Defendant¿s objections to the portions of Mr. Cantley¿s declaration regarding Mr. Currier¿s exposure to asbestos-containing insulation disturbed by defendant are overruled. = (220/HEK)
